target.rawSql: SELECT started_at AS time, 'Run started: ' || strategy_id || ' / ' || instrument_id AS text FROM strategy_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND strategy_id LIKE '$strategy_id' AND trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' AND instrument_id LIKE '$instrument_id' AND run_mode LIKE '$run_mode' ORDER BY started_at

SELECT stopped_at AS time, 'Run stopped: ' || strategy_id || ' / ' || instrument_id AS text FROM strategy_runs WHERE stopped_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(stopped_at) AND strategy_id LIKE '$strategy_id' AND trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' AND instrument_id LIKE '$instrument_id' AND run_mode LIKE '$run_mode' ORDER BY stopped_at

SELECT ts AS time, 'Acted: signal=' || signal::text || CASE WHEN bootstrap THEN ' (bootstrap)' ELSE '' END AS text FROM signal_events WHERE acted = true AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts

list.name: trader_id
list.label: Trader
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT trader_id FROM strategy_runs ORDER BY trader_id

list.name: strategy_id
list.label: Strategy
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT strategy_id FROM strategy_runs WHERE trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' ORDER BY strategy_id

list.name: instrument_id
list.label: Instrument
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT instrument_id FROM strategy_runs WHERE trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' AND strategy_id LIKE '$strategy_id' ORDER BY instrument_id

list.name: run_mode
list.label: Mode
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_mode FROM strategy_runs ORDER BY run_mode

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT id::text FROM strategy_runs WHERE trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' AND strategy_id LIKE '$strategy_id' AND instrument_id LIKE '$instrument_id' AND run_mode LIKE '$run_mode' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20

list.name: bar_interval_seconds
list.label: Bar Interval
list.description: Used by the Time-Since-Last-Bar-Close stat to subtract the bar interval from the raw gap. Pick the interval matching the trader you're monitoring.

panels.title: Time Since Last Bar Close
panels.description: Wall-clock time since the most recent bar close. Computed as (NOW() - MAX(signal_events.ts) - bar_interval), because signal_events.ts stores bar OPEN time (NT's canonical bar key). Reads ~0 right after a bar fires; climbs toward one bar interval before the next bar arrives, then resets. Yellow > one bar interval (next bar is overdue); red > two bar intervals (real wedge). Adjust the Bar Interval picker to match the trader you're monitoring.

targets.rawSql: SELECT GREATEST(0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(ts))) - ${bar_interval_seconds}::numeric) AS "Seconds Since Close" FROM signal_events WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'

panels.title: Time Since Last Fill
panels.description: Seconds since the most recent order_fills row. High values during ranging markets are normal; investigate if no fills for > 1 day during active hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(ts))), -1) AS "Seconds" FROM order_fills WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'

panels.title: Last Account Snapshot Age
panels.description: PersistenceActor writes an account_snapshots row every 60s. Warning > 2 min means executor lag or wedge.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(ts))), -1) AS "Seconds" FROM account_snapshots WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'

panels.title: Active Runs
panels.description: Number of strategy_runs rows with stopped_at IS NULL, filtered by trader/strategy/instrument/mode pickers. Should equal the number of trader containers you expect running.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active" FROM strategy_runs WHERE stopped_at IS NULL AND trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' AND strategy_id LIKE '$strategy_id' AND instrument_id LIKE '$instrument_id' AND run_mode LIKE '$run_mode'

panels.title: Signal Stream
panels.description: Per-bar signal gate state. +1 = LONG, -1 = SHORT, 0 = NONE. Stepwise interpolation shows the gate as a square wave; flips align with acted=true bars.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, signal AS "Signal" FROM signal_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts

panels.title: MA Divergence ((fast - slow) / slow)
panels.description: Relative gap between fast and slow MA from signal_events. Zero-crossings drive cross-gate flips. Shows how 'close to a flip' the gate is at any moment.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, (fast_value - slow_value) / NULLIF(slow_value, 0) AS "Divergence" FROM signal_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Bars Since Last Flip
panels.description: Count of signal_events rows since the last acted=true row. A trader stuck flipping every bar would read 0-1; a trader holding a trend would read in the tens.

targets.rawSql: WITH last_acted AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ts), '-infinity'::timestamptz) AS last_ts FROM signal_events WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND acted = true) SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Bars" FROM signal_events s, last_acted l WHERE s.run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND s.ts > l.last_ts

panels.title: Acted / Emitted (24h)
panels.description: Acted vs emitted bar count in the last 24h. Acted should be small (0-5 typically); high acted/emitted ratio is a warning sign for a flapping gate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acted) AS "Acted", COUNT(*) AS "Emitted" FROM signal_events WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Bootstrap Bars
panels.description: Count of signal_events with bootstrap=true. Should be 0 unless BOOTSTRAP_ON_DEPLOY is enabled and we're inside the bootstrap window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Bootstrap" FROM signal_events WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND bootstrap = true

panels.title: Recent Signal Events
panels.description: Most recent 50 signal_events rows. Use to spot-check that acted=true aligns with the cross_gate log lines.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, signal, acted, bootstrap FROM signal_events WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Account Balance
panels.description: account_snapshots.balance_total over time. KNOWN ISSUE: in sandbox, NT's MARGIN account does not appear to publish AccountState updates when positions close — even with calculate_account_state=True. The balance therefore reads flat at starting_capital regardless of realized PnL. The Cumulative PnL panel (which reads positions.realized_pnl directly, not the cached account balance) is the reliable source until this is resolved. Investigation pending — see PR notes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, balance_total AS "Balance" FROM account_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts_closed AS time, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY ts_closed) AS "Cumulative PnL" FROM positions WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_closed) AND run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts_closed

panels.title: Drawdown %
panels.description: Drawdown as % of running peak equity. Stays at 0 when balance is flat or rising; goes negative on drawdown. Note: this reads from account_snapshots.balance_total — if NT's MARGIN account isn't publishing balance updates on position close (a known sandbox quirk under investigation), this panel will show a flat 0 line even when realized PnL has moved. Cross-check against the Cumulative PnL panel which reads from positions.realized_pnl directly.

targets.rawSql: WITH peak AS (SELECT ts, balance_total, MAX(balance_total) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS peak_balance FROM account_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND run_id::text LIKE '$run_id') SELECT ts AS time, CASE WHEN peak_balance > 0 THEN -(peak_balance - balance_total) / peak_balance ELSE 0 END AS "Drawdown" FROM peak ORDER BY ts
SELECT position_id AS "Position", realized_pnl AS "PnL" FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts_closed DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0)::float / COUNT(*) ELSE 0 END AS "Win Rate" FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(realized_pnl), 0) AS "Total PnL" FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Fills" FROM order_fills WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'

panels.title: Current Open Position
panels.description: Currently-open position. Derived from order_fills + positions; cross-references the most recent signal_events row for mark-to-market unrealized PnL. ``current_px`` is the close of the most recent bar (lags by up to one bar_interval); ``price_age`` shows how stale that read is. ``unrealized_pnl = (current - entry) * qty`` for LONGs, ``(entry - current) * qty`` for SHORTs. Empty if flat.

targets.rawSql: WITH last_close AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ts_closed), '-infinity'::timestamptz) AS last_close_ts FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'), closing_oids AS (SELECT closing_order_id FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND closing_order_id IS NOT NULL), latest_price AS (SELECT bar_close, ts AS price_ts FROM signal_events WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND bar_close IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), opening_fill AS (SELECT order_side, last_qty, last_px, ts AS opened_at, instrument_id FROM order_fills, last_close WHERE order_fills.run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' AND order_fills.ts >= last_close.last_close_ts AND order_fills.client_order_id NOT IN (SELECT closing_order_id FROM closing_oids) ORDER BY order_fills.ts ASC LIMIT 1) SELECT CASE order_side WHEN 'BUY' THEN 'LONG' WHEN 'SELL' THEN 'SHORT' ELSE order_side END AS side, last_qty AS qty, last_px AS entry_px, latest_price.bar_close AS current_px, CASE WHEN latest_price.bar_close IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN order_side = 'BUY'  THEN (latest_price.bar_close - last_px) * last_qty WHEN order_side = 'SELL' THEN (last_px - latest_price.bar_close) * last_qty END AS unrealized_pnl, CASE WHEN latest_price.bar_close IS NULL OR last_px = 0 THEN NULL WHEN order_side = 'BUY'  THEN (latest_price.bar_close - last_px) / last_px WHEN order_side = 'SELL' THEN (last_px - latest_price.bar_close) / last_px END AS unrealized_return, opened_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - opened_at)) AS time_open, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - latest_price.price_ts)) AS price_age, instrument_id FROM opening_fill LEFT JOIN latest_price ON TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Positions" FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'

SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(AVG(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl < 0), 0) != 0 THEN ABS(AVG(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0) / AVG(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl < 0)) ELSE 0 END AS "Win/Loss Ratio" FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id'

WITH peak AS (SELECT balance_total, MAX(balance_total) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS peak_balance FROM account_snapshots WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id') SELECT MIN(CASE WHEN peak_balance > 0 THEN -(peak_balance - balance_total) / peak_balance ELSE 0 END) AS "Max Drawdown" FROM peak

panels.title: Recent Fills
panels.description: Per-fill rows for the selected run. ``order_side`` is color-coded (BUY green, SELL red). Whether a fill OPENS or CLOSES a position is not directly recorded in order_fills — derive by cross-referencing with the Recent Positions table's ts_opened/ts_closed columns. (A schema migration to add position_id to order_fills would let us show this directly; deferred to a future PR.)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, strategy_id, instrument_id, order_side, last_qty, last_px, commission, liquidity_side FROM order_fills WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Recent Positions
panels.description: Closed positions for the selected run. ``side`` (LONG/SHORT) is derived from ``entry_side``. ``close_reason`` explains WHY each position closed: ``strategy_exit`` (cross-flip, blue), ``protective_stop`` (yellow), ``liquidation`` (red), ``shutdown_flatten`` (trader was shutting down), ``unknown`` (couldn't resolve from order tags), or NULL for rows closed before migration 003.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts_opened, ts_closed, CASE entry_side WHEN 'BUY' THEN 'LONG' WHEN 'SELL' THEN 'SHORT' ELSE entry_side END AS side, close_reason, peak_qty, avg_px_open, avg_px_close, realized_pnl, realized_return, strategy_id, instrument_id FROM positions WHERE run_id::text LIKE '$run_id' ORDER BY ts_closed DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: All Runs (matching filters)
panels.description: All matching runs (active and completed) — Active = stopped_at IS NULL (green). Filtered by trader/strategy/instrument/mode pickers but ignores the run_id picker.

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, trader_id, strategy_id, instrument_id, run_mode, started_at, stopped_at FROM strategy_runs WHERE trader_id LIKE '$trader_id' AND strategy_id LIKE '$strategy_id' AND instrument_id LIKE '$instrument_id' AND run_mode LIKE '$run_mode' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20
